name: Harmony Design System — shadcn/ui + Tailwind + Radix
description: Harmony Design System for AI consumers — React components on shadcn/ui patterns, Tailwind, and Radix. Always ships Harmony package components (greenfield library), not theme-over-existing-app.

descriptions.component: Ship a Harmony package component on Radix + Tailwind / shadcn patterns. How (compose vs from-scratch) is recorded in plan Approach & stack fit + userDecision — not a separate strategy.
descriptions.skip: Do not convert; placeholder or accepted gap

readiness.summary: Playbooks complete for workspace layout, stack elegance HITL, Getting Started, ImportSnippet. Demo bootstrap shipped. Foundation execute awaits user Approach & stack fit sign-off; AI artifact set awaiting confirmation.
